gxio_mica_pka_context_t Struct Reference
[MiCA PKA Device API (gxio/pka.h)]

A context object used to manage MiCA PKA hardware resources. More...


Data Fields

int fd
 File descriptor for calling up to Linux (and thus the HV).
char * mmio_memory_base
 The VA at which MMIO access to registers and data is mapped.
char * mmio_regs_base
 The VA at which control registers are mapped.
char * mmio_data_base
 The VA at which data rings are mapped.
int num_rings
 The number of rings (1 - 4) set up in the PKA engine.
int ring_0_is_high_priority
 Whether the first ring has higher priority than the others.
pka_ring_t ring [PKA_NUM_RINGS]
 The descriptors for the command/result rings.

Detailed Description

A context object used to manage MiCA PKA hardware resources.

Field Documentation

int gxio_mica_pka_context_t::fd

File descriptor for calling up to Linux (and thus the HV).

char* gxio_mica_pka_context_t::mmio_memory_base

The VA at which MMIO access to registers and data is mapped.

char* gxio_mica_pka_context_t::mmio_regs_base

The VA at which control registers are mapped.

char* gxio_mica_pka_context_t::mmio_data_base

The VA at which data rings are mapped.

int gxio_mica_pka_context_t::num_rings

The number of rings (1 - 4) set up in the PKA engine.

int gxio_mica_pka_context_t::ring_0_is_high_priority

Whether the first ring has higher priority than the others.

pka_ring_t gxio_mica_pka_context_t::ring[PKA_NUM_RINGS]

The descriptors for the command/result rings.
